With a variety of floor plan options and top-notch amenities, our friendly leasing staff is eager to assist you in finding the perfect home. Meadow Creek Apartments - 1 bedroom/1 bath 1 bd, 1 ba | Available 7/01/26 Online application: www.lease-apts.com?n=meadow_creek&rp=orFeQcuuXAwC&t=ap Rental Terms Rent: $865 Application Fee: $75 Security Deposit: $600 Available 7/1/26 Pet Policy Cats allowed Dogs allowed Pet Policy: Breed restrictions- We prohibit vicious dogs such as Pit Bulls (including any mix breed), Akita, Doberman, Chow, Rottweiler, etc. If you are in doubt or have a question about a breed, please contact Management. If a pet is accepted, Resident is responsible for a one-time non-refundable pet fee of $150 in addition to a $25 pet fee each month per pet.
